title: Zelensky condemns US extension of Russian sanctions waiver
summary_full: The US argues that the waiver is meant to ease the energy supply crunch sparked by the US-Israel war with Iran.
summary_public: The US argues that the waiver is meant to ease the energy supply crunch sparked by the US-Israel war with Iran.
